title: Essential Fabric Mods Every Player Should Have (2026)
description: The short list of Fabric mods worth installing first: Fabric API, Sodium, Lithium, Iris, and ModMenu, plus the client layer. What each does and why it belongs in every setup.
excerpt: Five mods cover the basics of a clean Fabric setup. Here is the starter pack, in install order, and the client that sits on top of it.
author: trq

title: How to Install Shaders in Minecraft (2026)
description: Install shaders on Fabric with Iris and Sodium: add the two mods, drop a pack in the folder, pick it in video settings. Full steps, FPS tips, and how a client fits.
excerpt: Shaders on Fabric take three steps and no OptiFine. Here is the whole process, plus how to keep your framerate and run a client at the same time.
author: trq

title: Best Mods for Performance and Shaders in 2026
description: High FPS and good shaders at the same time on Fabric: Sodium for framerate, Iris for shaders, Lithium for the rest. What each does, how they stack, and where a client fits.
excerpt: You can run shaders and hold a high framerate, on the same setup, with a client on top. Here are the three mods that do it and how Opal slots in.
author: trq

title: How to Get More FPS in Minecraft (2026 Guide)
description: Two free Fabric mods do most of the work: Sodium for rendering and Lithium for game logic. Here is the setup, the settings that matter, and how to run a client at the same time.
excerpt: The fastest FPS win in Minecraft is two mods plus three settings. Here is the whole setup, and how Opal rides along without costing you frames.
author: trq

title: Why Opal is the Best Value Minecraft Client in 2026
description: At $8.99, Opal offers more features, better platform support, and a hybrid ghost/blatant approach that competitors several times the price can't match.
excerpt: We built Opal to be the most accessible premium client on the market. Here is what $8.99 actually gets you.
author: trq

title: Introducing Opal's GraalVM Scripting Engine
description: Write custom JavaScript that interacts with Opal's internal APIs. Automate tasks, react to game events, draw your own HUD, and extend the client at runtime.
excerpt: Opal's scripting engine runs on GraalVM, a full JavaScript runtime inside Minecraft. Here is what you can build with it.
author: trq

title: How to Use Opal's Config Sharing System
description: Browse, publish, and download community configs in Opal. Find optimized module presets for any playstyle, share your own, and auto-load them with scripting.
excerpt: Opal's config sharing system lets you discover and share module presets. Here is how to get the most out of it.
author: trq
